note: Sprint 7 = Sprint 6 carried items ONLY. Former Sprint 7 (21 tickets) re-numbered to Sprint 8. TKT-0323 is L effort (NOT M) — 16 atoms + 8 ACs across Part A (validator), Part B (14-agent config migration), Part C (cost monitoring). Full spec: state/tkt-0323-atoms.json. All 7 sequence items are Forge work. TKT-0327 (tilde-path) merged into TKT-0336 (P0 safe-path.sh). TKT-0317 children TKT-0321/0322 done in S6. Remaining TKT-0323+0324. TKT-0323 is now the committed item. TKT-0326 independent. TKT-0293, TKT-0318, TKT-0319, TKT-0137 backlog/carried.

capacity.reactive_absorbed: 1.5 days (OOM, launchd, journal v2.0, MEMORY trim, PG schema hardening, dupe cleanup)

sequence.note: TKT-0310 child. AC: validate file size before write, reject if > threshold, auto-truncate prompt injection.

sequence.title: P1-C: Cron Timeout Auto-Scaling — Adaptive Timeout + Retry + Process Group Reaping

sequence.title: P2: Constraint Hardening — Enforce Guards + Auto-Summarization + Cron Dashboard
sequence.note: TKT-0310 child. AC: integrate P0/P1 guards into auto-heal, auto-summarize oversized context, cron dashboard.

sequence.title: dispatch-validate.sh — Pre-Dispatch Validator + 14-Agent Config Migration + Cost Monitoring

sequence.title: NAS Writable Backup Target — End-to-end Backup Verification
